calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Fairfax County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Fairfax County Public Schools is Monday, August 23, 2027. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Fairfax County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Fairfax County Public Schools runs Apr 10, 2028–Apr 14, 2028, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Starts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: First day moves from Aug 24 to Aug 23 vs 2026–2027.

yearNumbers.label: Rosh Hashanah
yearNumbers.detail: School closed district-wide; falls about 3 weeks later than in 2026–2027 (Sep 12).

yearNumbers.label: Yom Kippur
yearNumbers.detail: Yom Kippur coincides with Indigenous Peoples' Day this year — both fall on October 11.

calendarNotes: Fairfax County Public Schools begins the 2027–2028 school year on August 23, 2027 and ends June 15, 2028. Spring Break runs April 10–14, 2028, aligned with Loudoun County.
